prose:
Water frontier-orbital energies and HOMO-LUMO gap — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz`, fixed (single point calculation). SCF converged in 7 cycles.

The HOMO energy is **-8.6037 eV**, the LUMO energy is **0.33695 eV**, and the HOMO-LUMO gap is **8.94067 eV**.

No warnings reported.

The calculation was performed with the chemkit tool.
